name: Asparagus with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak and rinse the asparagus.
2. Cut off the tips and set aside.
3. Boil the stalks in lightly salted water until tender.
4. Press the stalks through a sieve and return the pulp to the cooking water. Keep hot.
5. Finely chop the onion.
6. Melt the butter in a saucepan and gently fry the onion and asparagus tips for a few minutes.
7. Add the rice, mixing and turning with a wooden spoon until the grains are coated in the fat.
8. Pour the white wine over the rice, raise the heat, and boil briskly until the wine has evaporated.
9. Dissolve the bouillon cube and meat extract in the hot asparagus water.
10. Add a little of the liquid to the rice, lower the heat, stir, and add more liquid as it reduces, until the rice is al dente.
11. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
12. Glaze the rice with 1 tablespoon butter and add grated cheese.
13. Stir well and serve immediately.
